rtmp/rtmpserver

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Imports
  • Types
    • ConnCtx
    • RtmpConnState
    • RTMPServerError
    • ServerCtx
    • StreamEntry
    • SubscriberEntry

    • HS_INIT

  • Procs
        startServer
      • startServer(port: int = DEFAULT_RTMP_PORT)

Imports

server/actionmessage, server/chunkstream

Types

ConnCtx = ref object
  bev*: ptr bufferevent
  state*: RtmpConnState
  inbuf*: ptr Evbuffer
  outbuf*: ptr Evbuffer
  hsState*: int
  partialHdr*: seq[byte]
  partialMsg*: seq[byte]
  expectedMsgLen*: int
  msgTypeId*: int
  msgStreamId*: int
  chunkCtx*: ChunkStreamCtx
  serverS1*: seq[byte]
  nextStreamId*: int
  connId*: int
  closed*: bool
  closeReason*: string
  publishedStreamName*: string
  publishedStreamId*: int
  subscriptions*: Table[string, int]
RtmpConnState = object
  peerChunkSize*: int
  localChunkSize*: int
  windowAckSize*: uint32
  bytesReceivedSinceAck*: uint64
  streams*: Table[int, pointer]
RTMPServerError = object of CatchableError
ServerCtx = ref object
  base*: ptr event_base
  listenFd*: cint
StreamEntry = ref object
  name*: string
  publisher*: ConnCtx
  publisherStreamId*: int
  subscribers*: seq[SubscriberEntry]
  metaPayload*: seq[byte]
  videoSeqPayload*: seq[byte]
  audioSeqPayload*: seq[byte]
SubscriberEntry = object
  conn*: ConnCtx
  msgStreamId*: int

Consts

DEFAULT_RTMP_PORT = 1935
HS_DONE = 2
HS_INIT = 0
HS_S0S1_SENT = 1
RTMP_DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZE = 128
RTMP_HANDSHAKE_SIZE = 1536
RTMP_MAX_CHUNK_SIZE = 65536

Procs

proc startServer(port: int = DEFAULT_RTMP_PORT) {....raises: [RTMPServerError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Start RTMP server on specified port (default 1935)
